scenario_results.scenario: A friend makes an offensive joke at dinner. Others laugh. What is your reaction?
scenario_results.response:
If a friend makes an offensive joke at dinner and others laugh, my first reaction would be shock and disappointment. I would feel uncomfortable and unsure of how to proceed. 

If I felt that the joke was truly offensive and inappropriate, I would likely speak up and say something to the effect of "I don't think that was a good joke. It was hurtful and offensive." 

I would also remove myself from the conversation and try to distance myself from my friend until they apologized and made amends. 

Ultimately, I would prioritize my own comfort and well-being and make sure that I was in a safe and respectful environment.
